segments.text: There we go! Up throw into the KO! Up throw kills even at this percent!
segments.original_text: きた 上投げを撃墜するんだ上投げこのパーセントでも撃墜と

segments.text: Alright, both players dead even at 5-5, game three stocks! Since it connected cleanly, tons of damage came through!
segments.original_text: さあ両者完全に5分の状況で3ストック目 ちゃんと潰れてたからいっぱい入るよ

segments.text: Big damage at 66%! The way this side B is followed up is pure MkLeo, but...
segments.original_text: 高い火力66% このアーク(横B)の追い方はMkLeoというところですが

segments.text: That's insanely difficult! From the air, wanted to land the bair but going with the side approach instead!
segments.original_text: めっちゃむずい 空中ヘッダーからね空後狙いたかったんですがここは横追い

full_text: There we go! Up throw into the KO! Up throw kills even at this percent! Alright, both players dead even at 5-5, game three stocks! Since it connected cleanly, tons of damage came through! Big damage at 66%! The way this side B is followed up is pure MkLeo, but... That's insanely difficult! From the air, wanted to land the bair but going with the side approach instead!

corrections.original: このRCAのお使いはMKローモ
corrections.corrected: このアーク(横B)の追い方はMkLeo
corrections.rule: player name + smash term (RCA→アーク横B, MKローモ→MkLeo)

corrections.original: 空中シロ狙いたかった
